title: Kolding, Southern Denmark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kolding, Southern Denmark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kolding is a city in Southern Denmark with a population of 60,000. A port city on the Kolding Fjord, known for its 13th-century Koldinghus castle and design school.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
